ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the film */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "budget_millions" REAL /* Budget of the film in millions of dollars */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_rating" INTEGER /* Rotten Tomatoes critic rating percentage */,
  "audience_rating" INTEGER /* Audience rating percentage */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "rating_mpaa" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the film */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the film */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distributor */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("production_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for box office data */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "opening_weekend_sales" REAL /* Sales from the opening weekend */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales of the film */,
  "domestic_sales" REAL /* Domestic sales of the film */,
  "international_sales" REAL /* International sales of the film */,
  "opening_weekend_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening weekend */,
  "worldwide_release_date" TEXT /* Date of worldwide release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for production cost data */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "production_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for production */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for marketing */,
  "post_production_costs" REAL /* Costs associated with post-production */,
  "visual_effects_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for visual effects */,
  "casting_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for casting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_costs_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "critic_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for critic review data */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of critic reviews */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average critic rating */,
  "fresh_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of fresh reviews */,
  "rotten_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of rotten reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_critic_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for audience review data */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Total number of audience reviews */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average audience rating */,
  "user_score" REAL /* User score for the film */,
  "audience_score" REAL /* Audience score for the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audience_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cast entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the actor in the film */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "billing_position" INTEGER /* Billing position of the actor in the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_cast_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_cast_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "birthplace" TEXT /* Birthplace of the actor */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "birthplace" TEXT /* Birthplace of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_directors" (
  "film_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the film-director association */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the director in the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_directors_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Founding date of the production company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Founding date of the distributor */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_639_1" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_languages" (
  "film_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the film-language association */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_languages_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_3166_1_alpha_2" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_countries" (
  "film_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the film-country association */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_countries_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "film_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the film-award association */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)
